text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Kikuka Sho has arrived. Fans are
brimming with high expectations, eager to see
how the BNW trio has progressed since the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket heads out with one goal in
mind—to show the audience a heated and
exciting race.
